title: The end of oil? As fuel shocks cascade, 53 nations gather to plan a fossil fuel phaseout
description: US President Donald Trump is a longtime climate denier and oil industry ally, who sums up his own energy policy as “drill, baby, drill”. Yet he is doing more than almost anyone to speed up the global shift from fossil fuels to clean energy and electric vehicles (EVs).After the US and Israel struck Iran in [...] The post The end of oil? As fuel shocks cascade, 53 nations gather to plan a fossil fuel phaseout first appeared on Nagaland Post .
